files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@
+# Copyright (c) 2022 PAL Robotics S.L. All rights reserved.
+#
+# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+# You may obtain a copy of the License at
+#
+#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+#
+# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+# limitations under the License.
+
+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch.actions import DeclareLaunchArgument
+from launch.substitutions import LaunchConfiguration
+
+from launch_ros.actions import Node
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from launch_pal.arg_utils import LaunchArgumentsBase
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class LaunchArguments(LaunchArgumentsBase):
+    robot_name: DeclareLaunchArgument = DeclareLaunchArgument(
+        name="robot_name", description="Gazebo model name"
+    )
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld = LaunchDescription()
+    launch_arguments = LaunchArguments()
+
+    launch_arguments.add_to_launch_description(ld)
+
+    declare_actions(ld, launch_arguments)
+
+    return ld
+
+
+def declare_actions(
+    launch_description: LaunchDescription, launch_args: LaunchArguments
+):
+
+    robot_entity = Node(
+        package="gazebo_ros",
+        executable="spawn_entity.py",
+        arguments=[
+            "-topic",
+            "robot_description",
+            "-entity",
+            LaunchConfiguration("robot_name"),
+        ],
+        output="screen",
+    )
+    launch_description.add_action(robot_entity)
+
+    return

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="localization"  default="amcl"/>
+
+  <arg name="map"     default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/config"/>
+  <arg name="symlink" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/config"/>
+  <arg name="multiple" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix" default=""/>
+
+  <arg name="mapping" default=""/>
+
+  <!-- Map -->
+  <include file="$(find pal_navigation_sm)/launch/map.launch">
+    <arg name="map"     value="$(arg map)"/>
+    <arg name="symlink" value="$(arg symlink)"/>
+    <arg name="multiple" value="$(arg multiple)"/>
+    <arg name="tf_prefix" value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Localization -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/localization.launch">
+    <arg name="localization" value="$(arg localization)"/>
+    <arg name="multiple" value="$(arg multiple)"/>
+    <arg name="tf_prefix" value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+  </include>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="mapping" default="karto"/>
+
+  <!-- SLAM -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/mapping.launch">
+    <arg name="mapping" value="$(arg mapping)"/>
+  </include>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="state" default="localization"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
+  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
+  <arg name="mapping"        default="karto"/>
+  <arg name="octomap"        default="false"/>
+  <arg name="public_sim"     default="false"/>
+  <arg name="disable_vo"     default="false"/>
+  <arg name="rgbd_sensors"   default="false"/>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix"      default=""/>
+  <arg name="multiple"       default="false"/>
+
+  <arg name="map" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/config"/>
+
+  <!-- Localization or Mapping state -->
+  <node pkg="pal_navigation_sm" type="navigation.sh" name="navigation"
+        args="tiago $(arg state) $(arg localization) $(arg mapping) $(arg map) $(arg octomap) $(arg multiple) $(arg tf_prefix)" output="screen"/>
+
+  <!-- Navigation State Machine -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/state_machine.launch">
+    <arg name="state" value="$(arg state)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="map_frame" value="/$(arg tf_prefix)/map"/>
+    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="base_frame" value="/$(arg tf_prefix)/base_footprint"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Planning -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/move_$(arg planner).launch">
+    <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+    <arg name="rgbd_sensors"   value="$(arg rgbd_sensors)"/>
+    <arg name="tf_prefix"      value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+    <arg name="multiple"       value="$(arg multiple)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- VO map server -->
+  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)">
+    <include file="$(find pal_vo_server)/launch/vo_server.launch"/>
+  </group>
+
+</launch>

       <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" value="$(arg extra_gazebo_args)"/>
     </include>

       <arg name="mapping"        value="$(arg mapping)"/>
       <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>

data.author: PAL Bot
data.message:
Merge branch 'ros2_navigation' into 'foxy-devel'

Migration tiago_2dnav_gazebo

See merge request robots/tiago_simulation!76

files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +1,16 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.4.0)
 project(tiago_2dnav_gazebo)
 
-find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+find_package(ament_cmake_auto REQUIRED)
 
-catkin_package()
+# PAL Robotics stricter build flags, other developers should not worry about this
+find_package(ament_cmake_pal QUIET)
 
-foreach(dir launch)
-    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
-        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
-endforeach(dir)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_auto_package(INSTALL_TO_SHARE launch)

-<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
-<launch>
-
-  <arg name="state" default="localization"/>
-
-  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
-  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
-  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
-  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
-  <arg name="mapping"        default="karto"/>
-  <arg name="octomap"        default="false"/>
-  <arg name="public_sim"     default="false"/>
-  <arg name="disable_vo"     default="false"/>
-  <arg name="rgbd_sensors"   default="false"/>
-  <arg name="robot_namespace"      default=""/>
-  <arg name="multiple"       default="false"/>
-  <arg name="config_base_path" default="$(find pal_navigation_cfg_tiago)"/>
-  <arg name="laser_model"    default="sick-571"/>
-
-  <arg name="map" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/config"/>
-
-  <!-- Localization or Mapping state -->
-  <node pkg="pal_navigation_sm" type="navigation.sh" name="navigation"
-        args="tiago $(arg state) $(arg localization) $(arg mapping) $(arg map) $(arg octomap) $(arg multiple) $(arg robot_namespace)" output="screen"/>
-
-  <!-- Navigation State Machine -->
-  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/state_machine.launch">
-    <arg name="state" value="$(arg state)"/>
-    <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
-    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="map_frame" value="/$(arg robot_namespace)/map"/>
-    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="base_frame" value="/$(arg robot_namespace)/base_footprint"/>
-  </include>
-
-  <!-- Planning -->
-  <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/move_$(arg planner).launch">
-    <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
-    <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
-    <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
-    <arg name="rgbd_sensors"   value="$(arg rgbd_sensors)"/>
-    <arg name="robot_namespace"      value="$(arg robot_namespace)"/>
-    <arg name="multiple"       value="$(arg multiple)"/>
-    <arg name="config_base_path" value="$(arg config_base_path)"/>
-  </include>
-
-  <!-- VO map server -->
-  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)">
-    <include file="$(find pal_vo_server)/launch/vo_server.launch">
-      <arg name="fill_with_unknown" value="true"/>
-      <arg name="vo_resolution" value="0.3"/>
-    </include>
-  </group>
-
-  <!-- Robot Pose Publisher -->
-  <include file="$(find robot_pose)/launch/robot_pose.launch">
-    <arg name="robot_prefix"      value="$(arg robot_namespace)"/>
-  </include>
-
-  <!-- Laser filter (empty for public sim) -->
-  <node name="laser_filter" pkg="laser_filters" type="scan_to_scan_filter_chain">
-    <rosparam file="$(find tiago_laser_sensors)/config/$(arg laser_model)_filter.yaml" 
-              command="load" 
-              unless="$(eval arg('public_sim') or arg('multiple'))"/> 
-    <remap from="scan"          to="scan_raw"/>
-    <remap from="scan_filtered" to="scan"/>
-  </node>
-
-</launch>

+# limitations under the License.
+
+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch_pal.include_utils import include_launch_py_description
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld = LaunchDescription([
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_gazebo', ['launch', 'tiago_gazebo.launch.py'],
+            launch_arguments={
+                'world_name': 'pal_office',
+                }.items()),
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_2dnav', ['launch', 'tiago_nav_bringup.launch.py'],
+            launch_arguments={
+                'slam': 'True'
+                }.items()),
+    ])
+
+    return ld

+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch_pal.include_utils import include_launch_py_description
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld = LaunchDescription([
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_gazebo', ['launch', 'tiago_gazebo.launch.py']
+        ),
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_2dnav', ['launch', 'tiago_nav_bringup.launch.py'],
+            launch_arguments={
+                'slam': 'False'
+                }.items()),
+    ])
+
+    return ld

files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +1,16 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.4.0)
 project(tiago_2dnav_gazebo)
 
-find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+find_package(ament_cmake_auto REQUIRED)
 
-catkin_package()
+# PAL Robotics stricter build flags, other developers should not worry about this
+find_package(ament_cmake_pal QUIET)
 
-foreach(dir launch)
-    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
-        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
-endforeach(dir)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_auto_package(INSTALL_TO_SHARE launch)

data.author: Victor Lopez
data.message: Fix name of imu_controller launch

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 <launch>
   <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/launch/force_torque_controller.launch"/>
-  <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/launch/imu_sensor_controller.launch"/>
+  <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/launch/imu_controller.launch"/>
   <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/launch/default_controllers.launch"/>
   <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/launch/hey5_controller.launch"/>
   <!-- load gravity compensation controller with controllable wrist -->

data.author: victor
data.message:
Merge branch 'fix-multi-sim' into 'erbium-devel'

fixed multi sim rgbd scan

See merge request robots/tiago_simulation!67

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_multi)
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS)
+catkin_package()
+
+install(DIRECTORY launch
+    DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION})
+

@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+    <arg name="world"  default="empty"/>  <!-- empty, ... (see ../worlds) -->
+    <arg name="gui" default="true"/>
+    <arg name="debug" default="false"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim" default="false"/>
+
+    <env name="GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/models:$(optenv GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH)"/>
+
+    <env name="LC_NUMERIC" value="C" />
+
+    <!-- Gazebo start -->
+    <include file="$(find gazebo_ros)/launch/empty_world.launch">
+        <arg name="world_name" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/worlds/$(arg world).world"/>
+        <arg name="gui" value="$(arg gui)"/>
+        <arg name="debug" value="$(arg debug)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <group ns="tiago1">
+        <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 2.5 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+        <arg name="robot"  default="steel"/>          <!-- see tiago_description/robots/tiago_* -->
+
+        <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_spawn.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+            <arg name="multi"  value="multiple:=true namespace:=tiago1"/>
+            <arg name="model_name" value="tiago_$(arg robot)_1"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <!-- bring up robot -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/simulation_tiago_bringup.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"       value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="public_sim"  value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+            <arg name="tf_prefix" value="tiago1"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <node pkg="tf" type="static_transform_publisher" name="tiago1_bc" args="0 0 0 0 0 0 1 base_footprint tiago1/base_footprint 100"/>
+        <node name="tuck_arm" pkg="tiago_gazebo" type="tuck_arm.py" output="screen"/>
+    </group>
+
+    <group ns="tiago2">
+        <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y -2.5 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+        <arg name="robot"  default="steel"/>          <!-- see tiago_description/robots/tiago_* -->
+
+        <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_spawn.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+            <arg name="multi"  value="multiple:=true namespace:=tiago2"/>
+            <arg name="model_name" value="tiago_$(arg robot)_2"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <!-- bring up robot -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/simulation_tiago_bringup.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"       value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="public_sim"  value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+            <arg name="tf_prefix" value="tiago2"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <node pkg="tf" type="static_transform_publisher" name="tiago2_bc" args="0 0 0 0 0 0 1 base_footprint tiago2/base_footprint 100"/>
+        <node name="tuck_arm" pkg="tiago_gazebo" type="tuck_arm.py" output="screen"/>
+   </group>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+    <arg name="robot" default=""/>
+
+    <group ns="$(arg robot)">
+        <remap from="key_vel" to="twist_mux/cmd_vel"/>
+        <node pkg="key_teleop" type="key_teleop.py" name="key_teleop" output="screen"/>
+    </group>
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>tiago_multi</name>
+  <version>0.0.10</version>
+  <description>The tiago_multi package</description>
+
+  <maintainer email="david.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">davidfernandez</maintainer>
+  <license>BSD</license>
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_gazebo</run_depend>
+</package>

data.author: alessandrodifava-pal
data.message: Added the world cylinder on the table for the pick and place demo

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" ?>
+<sdf version="1.4">
+  <world name="default">
+    <physics type="ode">
+      <gravity>0 0 -9.81</gravity>
+      <ode>
+        <solver>
+          <type>quick</type>
+          <iters>20</iters>
+          <sor>1.0</sor>
+        </solver>
+        <constraints>
+          <cfm>0.0</cfm>
+          <erp>0.2</erp>
+          <contact_max_correcting_vel>100.0</contact_max_correcting_vel>
+          <contact_surface_layer>0.0</contact_surface_layer>
+        </constraints>
+      </ode>
+      <real_time_update_rate>1000</real_time_update_rate>
+      <max_step_size>0.001</max_step_size>
+    </physics>
+    <light type="directional" name="light1">
+      <cast_shadows>true</cast_shadows>
+      <pose>-2 0 4 0 0 0</pose>
+      <diffuse>1.0 1.0 1.0 1</diffuse>
+      <specular>0.1 0.1 0.1 1</specular>
+      <attenuation>
+        <range>20</range>
+        <constant>0.9</constant>
+        <linear>0.01</linear>
+        <quadratic>0.001</quadratic>
+      </attenuation>
+      <direction>0.2 0.0 -1.0</direction>
+    </light>
+    <!-- A ground plane -->
+    <include>
+      <uri>model://ground_plane</uri>
+    </include>
+    <!-- A table -->
+    <include>
+      <uri>model://table_0m8</uri>
+      <name>table1</name>
+      <pose>0.88 0 0 0 0 0</pose>
+    </include>
+    <!-- Object on the table -->
+    <include>
+      <uri>model://biscuits_pack</uri>
+      <pose>0.68 -0.05 0.93 0 0 2.62</pose>
+    </include>
+
+    <gui fullscreen="0">
+      <camera name="user_camera">
+        <pose>1.152670 -0.041479 3.496780 0.000000 1.123640 3.132190</pose>
+        <view_controller>orbit</view_controller>
+      </camera>
+    </gui>
+  </world>
+</sdf>

data.author: David Fernandez
data.message:
Allow multiple Tiagos on Gazebo

Fixes #15402

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@
 <launch>
   <arg name="robot" default="custom"/>
   <arg name="public_sim"     default="false"/>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix" default=""/>
 
   <!-- Load default controllers -->
   <include file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/launch/$(arg robot)_controllers.launch">
@@ -12,7 +13,7 @@
   <!-- Robot state publisher -->
   <node pkg="robot_state_publisher" type="state_publisher" name="robot_state_publisher">
     <param name="publish_frequency" type="double" value="50.0"/>
-    <param name="tf_prefix" type="string" value=""/>
+    <param name="tf_prefix" type="string" value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
   </node>
 
   <!-- TF lookup -->
@@ -31,7 +32,7 @@
   </group>
 
   <!-- Dynamic footprint -->
-  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)"> 
+  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)">
     <include file="$(find tiago_bringup)/launch/dynamic_footprint.launch">
       <arg name="robot" value="$(arg robot)"/>
     </include>

@@ -2,12 +2,14 @@
 <launch>
   <arg name="robot"  default="custom"/>
   <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0 -y 0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+  <arg name="multi" default=""/>
+  <arg name="model_name" default="tiago_$(arg robot)"/>
 
   <!-- PID gains -->
   <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/pids.yaml"/>
 
   <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/tiago_$(arg robot)_pal_hardware_gazebo.yaml"/>
-  
+
   <!-- Joint trajectory and diff drive controllers -->
   <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/joint_trajectory_controllers.yaml"/>
   <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/mobile_base_controller.yaml"/>
@@ -20,10 +22,11 @@
   <!-- Robot model -->
   <include file="$(find tiago_description)/robots/upload_tiago.launch">
     <arg name="robot" value="$(arg robot)"/>
+    <arg name="multi"  value="$(arg multi)"/>
   </include>
 
   <!-- Spawn robot in Gazebo -->
   <node pkg="gazebo_ros" type="spawn_model" name="spawn_model"
-    args="-urdf -param robot_description $(arg gzpose) -model tiago_$(arg robot)" />
+    args="-urdf -param robot_description $(arg gzpose) -model $(arg model_name)" />
 
 </launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_multi)
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS)
+catkin_package()
+
+install(DIRECTORY launch
+    DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION})
+

@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+    <arg name="world"  default="empty"/>  <!-- empty, ... (see ../worlds) -->
+    <arg name="gui" default="true"/>
+    <arg name="debug" default="false"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim" default="false"/>
+
+    <env name="GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/models:$(optenv GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH)"/>
+
+    <env name="LC_NUMERIC" value="C" />
+
+    <!-- Gazebo start -->
+    <include file="$(find gazebo_ros)/launch/empty_world.launch">
+        <arg name="world_name" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/worlds/$(arg world).world"/>
+        <arg name="gui" value="$(arg gui)"/>
+        <arg name="debug" value="$(arg debug)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <group ns="tiago1">
+        <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 2.5 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+        <arg name="robot"  default="steel"/>          <!-- see tiago_description/robots/tiago_* -->
+
+        <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_spawn.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+            <arg name="multi"  value="multiple:=true namespace:=tiago1"/>
+            <arg name="model_name" value="tiago_$(arg robot)_1"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <!-- bring up robot -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/simulation_tiago_bringup.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"       value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="public_sim"  value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+            <arg name="tf_prefix" value="tiago1"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <node pkg="tf" type="static_transform_publisher" name="tiago1_bc" args="0 0 0 0 0 0 1 base_footprint tiago1/base_footprint 100"/>
+        <node name="tuck_arm" pkg="tiago_gazebo" type="tuck_arm.py" output="screen"/>
+    </group>
+
+    <group ns="tiago2">
+        <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y -2.5 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+        <arg name="robot"  default="steel"/>          <!-- see tiago_description/robots/tiago_* -->
+
+        <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_spawn.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+            <arg name="multi"  value="multiple:=true namespace:=tiago2"/>
+            <arg name="model_name" value="tiago_$(arg robot)_2"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <!-- bring up robot -->
+        <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/simulation_tiago_bringup.launch">
+            <arg name="robot"       value="$(arg robot)"/>
+            <arg name="public_sim"  value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+            <arg name="tf_prefix" value="tiago2"/>
+        </include>
+
+        <node pkg="tf" type="static_transform_publisher" name="tiago2_bc" args="0 0 0 0 0 0 1 base_footprint tiago2/base_footprint 100"/>
+        <node name="tuck_arm" pkg="tiago_gazebo" type="tuck_arm.py" output="screen"/>
+   </group>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+    <arg name="robot" default=""/>
+
+    <group ns="$(arg robot)">
+        <remap from="key_vel" to="twist_mux/cmd_vel"/>
+        <node pkg="key_teleop" type="key_teleop.py" name="key_teleop" output="screen"/>
+    </group>
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>tiago_multi</name>
+  <version>0.0.10</version>
+  <description>The tiago_multi package</description>
+
+  <maintainer email="david.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">davidfernandez</maintainer>
+  <license>BSD</license>
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_gazebo</run_depend>
+</package>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_controller_configuration_gazebo)
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+catkin_package()
+
+foreach(dir config launch)
+    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
+endforeach(dir)
+
+install(PROGRAMS scripts/home_gripper.py
+  DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_BIN_DESTINATION})

@@ -0,0 +1,137 @@
+torque_constant:
+   arm_1_joint: 0.0735
+   arm_2_joint: 0.0735
+   arm_3_joint: -0.1149
+   arm_4_joint: -0.1149
+   arm_5_joint: 0.0 # 0.0487
+   arm_6_joint: 0.0 # 0.0487
+   arm_7_joint: 0.0 # 0.0487
+
+
+torque_control:
+  type: "walking_force_control/ArmTorqueControlComand"
+  joints:
+    - arm_1_joint
+    - arm_2_joint
+    - arm_3_joint
+    - arm_4_joint
+
+  base_link_name: "base_link"
+  reference_signal: "circle"
+  tip_link_name: "arm_7_link"
+  hardware: True
+  dt: 0.005
+
+
+controller_params:
+   torque_scaling_0: 1.0
+   viscous_friction_0: 2.1
+   static_friction_0: 0.5
+   torque_scaling_1: 1.5
+   viscous_friction_1: 1.7
+   static_friction_1: 0.6 
+   torque_scaling_2: 1.0
+   viscous_friction_2: 2.3
+   static_friction_2: 0.8
+   torque_scaling_3: 1.0
+   viscous_friction_3: 2.0
+   static_friction_3: 0.5
+
+gravity_compensation:
+  type: "walking_force_control/GravityCompensation"
+  joints:
+    - arm_1_joint
+    - arm_2_joint
+    - arm_3_joint
+    - arm_4_joint
+#    - arm_left_5_joint
+#    - arm_left_6_joint
+#    - arm_left_7_joint
+  reference_signal: "circle"
+  base_link_name: "base_link"
+  tip_link_name: "arm_7_link"
+  hardware: True
+
+  friction:
+   arm_1_joint: {s: 3.1, v: 0.4}
+   arm_2_joint: {s: 3.1, v: 0.4}
+   arm_3_joint: {s: 3.1, v: 0.4}
+   arm_4_joint: {s: 1.3, v: 0.4}
+   arm_5_joint: &default_friction {s: 0, v: 0}
+   arm_6_joint: *default_friction
+   arm_7_joint: *default_friction
+   head_1_joint: *default_friction
+   head_2_joint: *default_friction
+   torso_lift_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_back_left_1_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_back_left_2_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_back_right_1_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_back_right_2_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_front_right_1_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_front_right_2_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_front_left_1_joint: *default_friction
+   caster_front_left_2_joint: *default_friction
+   wheel_left_joint: *default_friction
+   wheel_right_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_abd_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_virtual_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_flex_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_virtual_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_flex_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_virtual_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_flex_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_index_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_abd_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_virtual_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_flex_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_virtual_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_flex_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_virtual_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_little_flex_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_abd_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_virtual_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_flex_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_virtual_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_flex_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_virtual_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_middle_flex_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_mrl_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_abd_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_virtual_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_flex_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_virtual_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_flex_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_virtual_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_ring_flex_3_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_abd_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_virtual_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_flex_1_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_virtual_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_flex_2_joint: *default_friction
+   hand_thumb_joint: *default_friction
+
+
+
+wrist_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - arm_5_joint
+    - arm_6_joint
+    - arm_7_joint
+  constraints:
+    goal_time:  0.6
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: 0.05
+    arm_left_5_joint:
+      goal: &goal_pos_constraint 0.02
+    arm_left_6_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_7_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+
+wrist_current_limit_controller:
+  type: "pal_ros_controllers/CurrentLimitController"
+  actuators:
+    - arm_5_motor

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+extra_joints:
+  - name: 'caster_back_left_1_joint'
+  - name: 'caster_back_left_2_joint'
+  - name: 'caster_front_left_1_joint'
+  - name: 'caster_front_left_2_joint'

@@ -0,0 +1,141 @@
+torso_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - torso_lift_joint
+
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: &goal_time_constraint 0.6
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: &stopped_velocity_constraint 5.0 # FIXME: See #8429
+    torso_1_joint:
+      goal: &goal_pos_constraint 0.02
+    torso_2_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+
+head_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - head_1_joint
+    - head_2_joint
+
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: 2.0
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: *stopped_velocity_constraint
+    head_1_joint:
+      goal: 0.5
+    head_2_joint:
+      goal: 0.5
+
+arm_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - arm_1_joint
+    - arm_2_joint
+    - arm_3_joint
+    - arm_4_joint
+    - arm_5_joint
+    - arm_6_joint
+    - arm_7_joint
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: *goal_time_constraint
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: *stopped_velocity_constraint
+    arm_left_1_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_2_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_3_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_4_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_5_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_6_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    arm_left_7_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+
+gripper_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - gripper_right_finger_joint
+    - gripper_left_finger_joint
+
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: *goal_time_constraint
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: *stopped_velocity_constraint
+    torso_1_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    torso_2_joint:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+
+hand_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - hand_thumb_joint
+    - hand_index_joint
+    - hand_mrl_joint
+
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: *goal_time_constraint
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: 0.75
+    hand_thumb_joint:
+      goal: &hand_goal_pos_constraint 0.3
+    hand_index_joint:
+      goal: 0.6
+    hand_mrl_joint:
+      goal: *hand_goal_pos_constraint
+  stop_trajectory_duration: 0.0
+
+shadow_hand_controller:
+  type: "position_controllers/JointTrajectoryController"
+  joints:
+    - FFJ1
+    - FFJ2
+    - FFJ3
+    - FFJ4
+    - MFJ1
+    - MFJ2
+    - MFJ3
+    - MFJ4
+    - RFJ1
+    - RFJ2
+    - RFJ3
+    - RFJ4
+    - THJ1
+    - THJ2
+    - THJ4
+    - THJ5
+  constraints:
+    goal_time: *goal_time_constraint
+    stopped_velocity_tolerance: *stopped_velocity_constraint
+    FFJ1:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    FFJ2:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    FFJ3:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    FFJ4:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    MFJ1:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    MFJ2:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    MFJ3:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    MFJ4:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    RFJ1:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    RFJ2:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    RFJ3:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    RFJ4:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    THJ1:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    THJ2:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    THJ4:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint
+    THJ5:
+      goal: *goal_pos_constraint

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+mobile_base_controller:
+  type        : "diff_drive_controller/DiffDriveController"
+  left_wheel  : 'wheel_left_joint'
+  right_wheel : 'wheel_right_joint'
+  publish_rate: 50.0
+  pose_covariance_diagonal : [0.001, 0.001, 1000000.0, 1000000.0, 1000000.0, 1000.0]
+  twist_covariance_diagonal: [0.001, 0.001, 1000000.0, 1000000.0, 1000000.0, 1000.0]
+
+  # Velocity commands timeout [s]
+  cmd_vel_timeout: 0.25
+
+  # Base frame_id
+  base_frame_id: base_footprint
+
+  # Velocity and acceleration limits
+  # Whenever a min_* is unspecified, default to -max_*
+  linear:
+    x:
+      has_velocity_limits    : true
+      max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
+      min_velocity           : -0.2 # m/s
+      has_acceleration_limits: true
+      max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
+  angular:
+    z:
+      has_velocity_limits    : true
+      max_velocity           : !degrees 120.0
+      has_acceleration_limits: true
+      max_acceleration       : !degrees 120.0

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+mobile_base_controller:
+  # Wheel separation and radius multipliers for PMB2

+#!/usr/bin/env python
+
+import rospy
+import actionlib
+from control_msgs.msg import FollowJointTrajectoryAction, FollowJointTrajectoryGoal
+from trajectory_msgs.msg import JointTrajectory, JointTrajectoryPoint
+from sensor_msgs.msg import JointState
+
+joint_names = ["gripper_left_finger_joint", "gripper_right_finger_joint"]
+closed  = [0.045, 0.045]
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+  rospy.init_node("home_gripper")
+  rospy.loginfo("Waiting for gripper_controller...")
+  client = actionlib.SimpleActionClient("gripper_controller/follow_joint_trajectory", FollowJointTrajectoryAction)
+  client.wait_for_server()
+  rospy.loginfo("...connected.")
+
+  rospy.wait_for_message("/joint_states", JointState)
+
+  trajectory = JointTrajectory()
+  trajectory.joint_names = joint_names
+  trajectory.points.append(JointTrajectoryPoint())
+  trajectory.points[0].positions = closed
+  trajectory.points[0].velocities = [0.0 for i in joint_names]
+  trajectory.points[0].accelerations = [0.0 for i in joint_names]
+  trajectory.points[0].time_from_start = rospy.Duration(2.0)
+
+  rospy.loginfo("Opening gripper...")
+  goal = FollowJointTrajectoryGoal()
+  goal.trajectory = trajectory
+  goal.goal_time_tolerance = rospy.Duration(0.0)
+
+  client.send_goal(goal)
+  client.wait_for_result(rospy.Duration(3.0))
+  rospy.loginfo("Gripper opened.")

+
+  <!-- Dynamic footprint -->

+
+</launch>

data.author: job-1994
data.message: New launch file for the pick and place demo, also provided the world

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+<launch> 
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_2dnav_gazebo)/custom.yaml" />
+            <rosparam command="load" file="$(find pick_aruco_demo)/config/motions.yaml"/>
+
+  <arg name="namespace" default="/"/>
+
+  <arg name="world"  default="pick"/>
+  <arg name="robot"  default="steel"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="navfn"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
+  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
+  <arg name="map"            default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/configurations/$(arg world)"/>
+
+  <arg name="rviz"     default="true"/>
+  <arg name="gzclient" default="true"/>
+
+  <include file="$(find pick_aruco_demo)/launch/pick_cluster_robocup_real_robot.launch">
+  </include>
+
+  <group ns="$(arg namespace)">
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_gazebo.launch">
+      <arg name="world"  value="$(arg world)"/>
+      <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+      <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+      <arg name="gui"    value="$(arg gzclient)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/navigation.launch">
+      <arg name="state"          value="localization"/>
+      <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>
+      <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="localization"   value="$(arg localization)"/>
+      <arg name="map"            value="$(arg map)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+          args="-d $(find tiago_2dnav)/config/rviz/navigation.rviz"/>
+    
+    <node name="depth_service" pkg="tiago_clusters" type="depth_throtle_server.py"/>
+    
+        <include file="$(find pick_aruco_demo)/launch/single.launch"/>
+        <node name="pointcloud_on_request" pkg="pick_aruco_demo" type="pointcloud_on_request.py" output="screen" />
+        <include file="$(find spherical_grasps)/launch/pick_and_place_server_tiago_steel.launch" />
+
+
+
+  </group>
+
+</launch>

data.author: bmagyar
data.message: Initial commit of tiago_simulation

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_gazebo)
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS)
+catkin_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+
+<launch>
+  <arg name="world"  default="empty"/>  <!-- empty, ... (see ../worlds) -->
+  <arg name="robot"  default="full"/>          <!-- see tiago_description/robots/tiago_* -->
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.85 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+  <arg name="gui" default="true"/>
+  <arg name="debug" default="false"/>
+
+  <env name="GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/models:$(optenv GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH)"/>
+
+  <!-- start up world -->
+  <include file="$(find gazebo_ros)/launch/empty_world.launch">
+    <arg name="world_name" value="$(find tiago_gazebo)/worlds/$(arg world).world"/>
+    <arg name="gui" value="$(arg gui)"/>
+    <arg name="debug" value="$(arg debug)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_spawn.launch">
+    <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+    <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- bring up robot -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_bringup)/launch/tiago_bringup.launch"/>
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+<launch>
+  <arg name="robot"  default="full"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0 -y 0 -z 0.85 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+
+  <!-- PID gains -->
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/config/pids.yaml"/>
+
+  <!-- Joint trajectory and diff drive controllers -->
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/config/joint_trajectory_controllers.yaml"/>
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find tiago_controller_configuration)/config/mobile_base_controller.yaml"/>
+
+  <!-- Joystick controller parameters -->
+  <!--
+  <rosparam file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/config/joy_teleop_sim.yaml" command="load"/>
+  -->
+
+  <!-- Robot model -->
+  <include file="$(find tiago_description)/robots/upload_tiago.launch">
+    <arg name="robot" value="$(arg robot)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Spawn robot in Gazebo -->
+  <node pkg="gazebo_ros" type="spawn_model" name="spawn_model"
+    args="-urdf -param robot_description $(arg gzpose) -model tiago_$(arg robot)" />
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>tiago_gazebo</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>The tiago_gazebo package</description>
+  <maintainer email="bence.magyar@pal-robotics.com">Bence Magyar</maintainer>
+  <license>BSD</license>
+  <author email="bence.magyar@pal-robotics.com">Bence Magyar</author>
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <run_depend>gazebo_plugins</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>pal_gazebo_plugins</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_bringup</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_controller_configuration</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_description</run_depend>
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" ?>
+<sdf version="1.4">
+  <world name="default">
+    <physics type="ode">
+      <gravity>0 0 -9.81</gravity>
+      <ode>
+        <solver>
+          <type>quick</type>
+          <iters>20</iters>
+          <sor>1.0</sor>
+        </solver>
+        <constraints>
+          <cfm>0.0</cfm>
+          <erp>0.2</erp>
+          <contact_max_correcting_vel>100.0</contact_max_correcting_vel>
+          <contact_surface_layer>0.0</contact_surface_layer>
+        </constraints>
+      </ode>
+      <real_time_update_rate>1000</real_time_update_rate>
+      <max_step_size>0.001</max_step_size>
+    </physics>
+    <!-- A global light source -->
+    <include>
+      <uri>model://sun</uri>
+    </include>
+    <!-- A ground plane -->
+    <include>
+      <uri>model://ground_plane</uri>
+    </include>
+  </world>
+</sdf>

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_hardware_gazebo)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED
+    COMPONENTS
+      angles
+      hardware_interface
+      joint_limits_interface
+      gazebo_ros_control
+      control_toolbox
+    )
+
+find_package(gazebo REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package(
+    INCLUDE_DIRS include
+    CATKIN_DEPENDS
+      control_toolbox
+      gazebo_ros_control
+      joint_limits_interface
+      hardware_interface
+    LIBRARIES ${PROJECT_NAME}
+)
+
+include_directories(include ${catkin_INCLUDE_DIRS} ${GAZEBO_INCLUDE_DIRS})
+link_directories(${GAZEBO_LIBRARY_DIRS})
+
+add_library(${PROJECT_NAME} src/tiago_hardware_gazebo.cpp)
+target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} ${catkin_LIBRARIES} ${GAZEBO_LIBRARIES})
+
+install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
+  ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_LIB_DESTINATION}
+  LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_LIB_DESTINATION}
+  RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_BIN_DESTINATION}
+  )
+
+install(DIRECTORY include/
+   DESTINATION ${CATKIN_GLOBAL_INCLUDE_DESTINATION}
+   FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.h"
+)
+install (FILES tiago_hardware_gazebo_plugins.xml
+    DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION})

@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@

+// SUBSTITUTE GOODS OR SERVICES; LOSS OF USE, DATA, OR PROFITS; OR BUSINESS
+// INTERRUPTION) HOWEVER CAUSED AND ON ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY, WHETHER IN
+// CONTRACT, STRICT LIABILITY, OR TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE OR OTHERWISE)
+// ARISING IN ANY WAY OUT OF THE USE OF THIS SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE
+// POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE.
+//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
+
+#ifndef ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_H
+#define ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_H
+
+#include <vector>
+#include <string>
+
+#include <control_toolbox/pid.h>
+
+#include <hardware_interface/robot_hw.h>
+#include <hardware_interface/joint_state_interface.h>
+#include <hardware_interface/joint_command_interface.h>
+#include <hardware_interface/imu_sensor_interface.h>
+#include <joint_limits_interface/joint_limits_interface.h>
+
+#include <pluginlib/class_list_macros.h>
+
+#include <gazebo_ros_control/robot_hw_sim.h>
+
+#include <angles/angles.h>
+
+#include <gazebo/gazebo.hh>
+#include <gazebo/physics/physics.hh>
+#include <gazebo/sensors/ImuSensor.hh>
+#include <gazebo/common/common.hh>
+
+namespace tiago_hardware_gazebo
+{
+
+class TiagoHardwareGazebo : public gazebo_ros_control::RobotHWSim
+{
+public:
+
+  TiagoHardwareGazebo();
+
+  // Simulation-specific
+  bool initSim(const std::string& robot_namespace,
+      ros::NodeHandle model_nh,
+      gazebo::physics::ModelPtr parent_model,
+      const urdf::Model* const urdf_model,
+      std::vector<transmission_interface::TransmissionInfo> transmissions);
+  void readSim(ros::Time time, ros::Duration period);
+  void writeSim(ros::Time time, ros::Duration period);
+
+
+private:
+  // Raw data
+  unsigned int pos_n_dof_;
+  unsigned int vel_n_dof_;
+  unsigned int n_dof_;
+
+  std::vector<std::string> transmission_names_;
+
+  std::vector<double> jnt_pos_;
+  std::vector<double> jnt_vel_;
+  std::vector<double> jnt_eff_;
+
+  std::vector<double> jnt_pos_cmd_;
+  std::vector<double> jnt_pos_cmd_curr_; // NOTE: This is the same as jnt_pos_ but only with the joints in pos_sim_joints_. Needs cleaner implementation
+
+  std::vector<double> jnt_vel_cmd_;
+
+  double base_orientation_[4];
+  double base_ang_vel_[3];
+  double base_lin_acc_[3];
+
+  // Simulation-specific
+  std::vector<gazebo::physics::JointPtr> sim_joints_;
+  std::vector<gazebo::physics::JointPtr> pos_sim_joints_;
+  std::vector<gazebo::physics::JointPtr> vel_sim_joints_;
+  boost::shared_ptr<gazebo::sensors::ImuSensor> imu_sensor_;
+
+  // Hardware interface: joints
+  hardware_interface::JointStateInterface    jnt_state_interface_;
+  hardware_interface::PositionJointInterface jnt_pos_cmd_interface_;
+  hardware_interface::VelocityJointInterface jnt_vel_cmd_interface_;
+
+  // Hardware interface: sensors
+  hardware_interface::ImuSensorInterface     imu_sensor_interface_; // For inclinometer
+
+  // Joint limits interface
+  joint_limits_interface::PositionJointSoftLimitsInterface pos_jnt_limits_interface_;
+  joint_limits_interface::VelocityJointSaturationInterface vel_jnt_limits_interface_;
+
+  // PID controllers
+  std::vector<control_toolbox::Pid> pids_;
+
+  template <class T>
+  std::string containerToString(const T& cont, const std::string& prefix)
+  {
+    std::stringstream ss;
+    ss << prefix;
+    std::copy(cont.begin(), --cont.end(), std::ostream_iterator<typename T::value_type>(ss, prefix.c_str()));
+    ss << *(--cont.end());
+    return ss.str();
+  }
+
+};
+
+}
+
+#endif // ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_ANT_HARDWARE_GAZEBO_H

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@

+
+  <run_depend>control_toolbox</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>hardware_interface</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>joint_limits_interface</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>gazebo_ros_control</run_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <gazebo_ros_control plugin="${prefix}/tiago_hardware_gazebo_plugins.xml"/>
+  </export>
+
+</package>

+</library>

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@

data.author: enriquefernandez
data.message: adds tiago_2dnav_gazebo

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_2nav_gazebo)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package()
+
+foreach(dir launch)
+    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
+endforeach(dir)

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+<launch>
+  <arg name="namespace" default="/"/>
+
+  <arg name="world"  default="small_office"/>
+  <arg name="robot"  default="full_v2"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="navfn"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
+  <arg name="mapping"        default="karto"/>
+
+  <arg name="rviz"     default="true"/>
+  <arg name="gzclient" default="true"/>
+
+  <group ns="$(arg namespace)">
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_gazebo.launch">
+      <arg name="world"  value="$(arg world)"/>
+      <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+      <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+      <arg name="gui"    value="$(arg gzclient)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/navigation.launch">
+      <arg name="state"          value="mapping"/>
+      <arg name="mapping"        value="$(arg mapping)"/>
+      <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>
+      <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+          args="-d $(find tiago_2dnav)/config/rviz/navigation.rviz"/>
+  </group>
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+<launch>
+  <arg name="namespace" default="/"/>
+
+  <arg name="world"  default="small_office"/>
+  <arg name="robot"  default="full_v2"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="navfn"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
+  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
+  <arg name="map"            default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/configurations/$(arg world)"/>
+
+  <arg name="rviz"     default="true"/>
+  <arg name="gzclient" default="true"/>
+
+  <group ns="$(arg namespace)">
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_gazebo)/launch/tiago_gazebo.launch">
+      <arg name="world"  value="$(arg world)"/>
+      <arg name="robot"  value="$(arg robot)"/>
+      <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+      <arg name="gui"    value="$(arg gzclient)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <include file="$(find tiago_2dnav)/launch/navigation.launch">
+      <arg name="state"          value="localization"/>
+      <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>
+      <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="localization"   value="$(arg localization)"/>
+      <arg name="map"            value="$(arg map)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+          args="-d $(find tiago_2dnav)/config/rviz/navigation.rviz"/>
+  </group>
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>tiago_2dnav_gazebo</name>
+  <version>0.9.0</version>
+  <description>TiaGo-specific launch files needed to run
+    navigation on the TiaGo robot.</description>
+  <maintainer email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</maintainer>
+  <license>Modified BSD</license>
+  <author email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</author>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <run_depend>tiago_gazebo</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>tiago_2dnav</run_depend>
+</package>

data.author: Enrique Fernandez
data.message:
Merge branch 'add_tiago_2dnav_gazebo' into 'cobalt-devel'

Add tiago_2dnav_gazebo

Taken from ant_2dnav_gazebo and renamed
